query: mutation { updateProjectV2Field(input: {projectId: "PVT_kwHOBADC7M4BQPbr", fieldId: "PVTSSF_lAHOBADC7M4BQPbrzg-axL4", singleSelectField: {options: [{name: "Backlog", color: GRAY, description: "Issues pendientes del product backlog"}, {name: "Sprint Activo", color: BLUE, description: "Seleccionado para el sprint actual"}, {name: "En Progreso", color: YELLOW, description: "En desarrollo actualmente"}, {name: "En Revision", color: ORANGE, description: "En code review o QA"}, {name: "Done", color: GREEN, description: "Completado y mergeado"}]}}) { projectV2Field { ... on ProjectV2SingleSelectField { id name options { id name } } } } }
